Hero.paragraph: We help businesses increase trust, stand out, and generate qualified leads with a sharp brand, a high-performance website, and conversion-focused marketing.

Benefits.description: Choosing a digital agency shouldn't feel like a leap of faith. We focus on clarity, performance, and measurable outcomes — not just deliverables.

items.title: Conversion-first thinking

items.title: Senior-level execution
items.description: No bloated structures. No endless hand-offs. You work directly with experienced specialists focused on quality and results.

items.title: Built for real business outcomes

items.title: Clear process, no surprises
items.description: Transparency removes uncertainty. You always know what we're doing, why it matters, and how it impacts your growth.

items.title: Long-term performance mindset
items.description: We build assets that continue working long after launch — brands that stay relevant, websites that convert, systems that scale.

items.question: How Does The Subscription Model Work?
items.answer: You pay a fixed monthly fee and get access to a dedicated design team. Submit unlimited requests, and we'll deliver them one by one (or two at a time with the Pro plan). No hourly billing, no contracts — cancel or pause anytime.

items.question: What Kind Of Design Tasks Can I Request?
items.answer: Anything design-related! From brand identity and logo design to web design, mobile app UI, social media graphics, pitch decks, packaging, and more. If it's visual, we've got you covered.

items.question: How Fast Will I Receive My Designs?
items.answer: Most requests are delivered within 2-3 business days. More complex projects like full website designs or brand identity systems may take a bit longer, but we'll always keep you updated on timelines.

items.question: What Tools Do You Use To Manage The Work?
items.answer: We use a custom design portal where you can submit requests, track progress, provide feedback, and approve deliverables — all in one place. It's simple, organized, and async-friendly.

items.question: Is There A Limit To How Many Requests I Can Make?
items.answer: No! You can submit as many requests as you'd like. We work through them one at a time (or two with the Pro plan) to ensure top quality on every deliverable.

items.question: Can I Cancel Or Pause Anytime?
items.answer: Absolutely. There are no long-term contracts. You can pause your subscription when you don't need design work and resume when you're ready. Cancel anytime with no penalties.

Contact.heading: Let's Talk.
Contact.description: Got questions or ready to start your design project? Let's bring your ideas to life!

Footer.newsletterDesc: Join our newsletter and stay updated on the latest trends in digital design.

hero.heading1: Your website should bring clients in.
hero.paragraph: We design and build custom websites for small businesses — fast, clear, and built to convert. Not just to look good.
hero.noPressure: No pressure. No commitment. Just honest feedback on what your site is missing.
hero.trustSub: They hit their targets — you're next.

problem.heading: Most small business websites are costing you clients.

items.title: First impressions happen in 3 seconds.
items.body: If your site looks outdated, slow, or confusing, visitors leave before they even read what you do. You never get that moment back.

items.title: "Nice-looking" isn't enough.
items.body: A website that doesn't convert is just an expensive brochure. You need clarity, trust signals, and a clear path to contact.

items.title: You shouldn't have to manage this yourself.
items.body: You're busy running your business. Dealing with a DIY website or chasing freelancers takes time you don't have.

solution.heading: We take the time to do it right.
solution.p1: Not templates. Not rushed timelines. We take the time to understand your business, your customers, and your goals — then build something that actually serves all three.
solution.p2: You get a partner who's with you from the first conversation to launch day and beyond. No hand-offs. No confusion.

pillars.title: Personalized
pillars.body: Every site is built around your specific business — your brand, your audience, your goals. We never recycle work.

pillars.title: End-to-end
pillars.body: From the first call to launch and beyond, we handle everything and keep you informed at every step.

pillars.title: Quality-first
pillars.body: We would rather take an extra day than deliver something that doesn't meet the bar. No shortcuts.

deliverables.heading: Everything your website needs. Nothing it doesn't.
deliverables.subtext: A complete, ready-to-launch website — handled for you, start to finish.
items: Custom design built around your brand — not a generic template
Mobile-first, fully responsive layout across all devices
Clear calls-to-action designed to drive contact and inquiries
Contact form with basic integrations (email, CRM-ready)
On-page SEO foundations: meta tags, structured content, page speed

outcomes.heading: What changes when your website actually works.

items.title: More qualified inquiries
items.body: Visitors who land on a clear, credible site are more likely to reach out — and more likely to be the right fit.

items.title: Higher perceived trust
items.body: Your website is often the first thing a potential client sees. Look like the premium option in your market before they even call.

items.title: Less friction, more conversions
items.body: When it's easy to understand what you do and how to contact you, people do it. Friction kills leads.

outcomes.ctaDesc: Start with a free audit — we'll tell you exactly what's holding it back.

proof.heading: Businesses that trusted us.
proof.trustSub: They hit their targets — you're next.

testimonials.name: Jared Kim
testimonials.quote: We submitted our request on Monday and had polished designs by Wednesday. The quality was unmatched.

process.heading: Simple. Clear. No surprises.
process.subtext: Four steps from first conversation to a live, converting website.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.body: We start with a call to understand your business, your audience, and what you want your website to do. No jargon, no fluff.

steps.title: Design
steps.body: We create a custom mockup tailored to your brand. You see and approve the design before a single line of code is written.

steps.title: Build
steps.body: We develop your site with performance, SEO, and mobile experience in mind. You're kept in the loop throughout.

steps.title: Launch & Support
steps.body: We go live together. You get 30 days of post-launch support — questions, fixes, and adjustments, all covered.

faq.heading: Questions we get asked a lot.

items.q: How long does a website project usually take?
items.a: Most projects are completed in 3–6 weeks. Simple sites can move faster; projects with custom features take a little longer. We set a clear timeline from the start and stick to it.

items.q: Do I need to provide copy and images, or do you help with that?
items.a: You'll provide the core information about your business — you know it best. We guide you through exactly what's needed, help refine the messaging, and can connect you with photographers or copywriters if needed.

items.q: Can you redesign my existing website instead of starting from scratch?
items.a: Absolutely. Many clients come to us with a site that isn't performing. We assess what's working, what isn't, and either refresh the design or rebuild it properly — whichever serves your goals best.

items.q: Will my site work on mobile and load fast?
items.a: Always. Every site we build is mobile-first and performance-optimized. We test across devices and screen sizes before launch so you can be confident it works everywhere.

items.q: What happens after the website goes live?
items.a: Every project includes 30 days of post-launch support — fixes, minor adjustments, and guidance. After that, we offer ongoing maintenance or hand you off with full documentation.

items.q: How is this different from a builder like Squarespace or Wix?
items.a: Template builders give you a generic starting point. We build something specific to your business, your audience, and your goals — a site that converts better, loads faster, and looks like it belongs in the premium tier of your market.

form.heading: Start with a free website audit.
form.description: No pitch. No pressure. We'll review your current website (or brief) and give you honest feedback on what's holding it back.
checklist: Free, no-strings review of your current site
Specific, actionable feedback — not generic advice
form.goalLbl: What's your main goal in the next 90 days?
form.goalPlaceholder: e.g. Get more inquiries from our website, launch before our busy season...
form.noCommitment: No pitch. No commitment. We'll reply within 1 business day.
form.successDesc: Thanks for reaching out. We'll review your site and get back to you within 1 business day.
